summary: Iteration 92 - Comprehensive testing of Wealth Command Financial Advisor OS after user reported 'Errors on Adviser CRM'. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified CRM, Macro Dashboard, and Scenario Modelling pages load correctly with proper data.

issues: Compliance modal (Important Information) appears on every page load - expected behavior for financial compliance. User must check checkbox and click 'I Understand & Accept' to dismiss.
Route /markets shows blank page - correct route is /macro-dashboard. Navigation sidebar shows 'Markets' link which works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: All 26 backend API tests passed - CRM, Macro, News, Xplan, Decision Engine, Trading, Live Stock, Knowledge Graph, Client Portal, Financial Plans, Crypto
PASS: GET /api/crm/clients returns 8 clients with valid data structure (client_id, name, email, status, total_wealth)
PASS: GET /api/crm/analytics returns summary stats (total_clients, total_aum, estimated_annual_revenue)
PASS: GET /api/macro/overview returns market data with highlights (indices, currencies, commodities, crypto)
PASS: GET /api/news/headlines returns financial news headlines
PASS: GET /api/xplan/status returns connection status (demo mode)
PASS: POST /api/decision-engine/health-score-v2 calculates health score correctly
PASS: GET /api/live/stock/CBA returns ASX stock price with correct .AX suffix
PASS: GET /api/graph/overview returns knowledge graph stats
PASS: GET /api/client-portal/net-worth/client_1 returns net worth data
PASS: CRM page loads with 8 client cards, Total AUM $22,280,000
PASS: Client card click navigates to Client 360 page (SPA navigation)
PASS: Client 360 shows comprehensive client details (goals, assets, family, insurance)
PASS: Macro Dashboard loads with real-time market data (S&P 500, ASX 200, AUD/USD, Gold, Bitcoin)
PASS: Scenario Modelling page loads with 4 tabs (Goals, Assets, Scenario, Projection) and 4 goal cards

success_rate.frontend: 100% (CRM, Macro Dashboard, Scenario Modelling all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 verified all major features working correctly. No CRM errors found - user's reported 'Errors on Adviser CRM' could not be reproduced. All APIs return valid data. Frontend pages load correctly. Compliance modal appears on every page (expected financial compliance behavior). Note: /markets route is blank - use /macro-dashboard instead.

crm_command_center.ui_status: PASS - 8 clients displayed, cards clickable, navigation to Client 360 works

scenario_modelling.ui_status: PASS - 4 tabs (Goals, Assets, Scenario, Projection), 4 goal cards displayed
